name: render_diagram
description: Render a PlantUML or Mermaid diagram source string to an SVG or PNG image file. Saves to data/documents/ and returns a download_path for embedding in export_document or linking in chat. After a successful render, include the returned download_path as a Markdown image in your response if displaying inline, or pass it to export_document sections. Prefer PlantUML for UML diagrams (full UML 2.x: class, sequence, activity, use case, component, deployment, state, timing). Use Mermaid only for flowcharts already written in Mermaid syntax.

source.description: Diagram source code. For PlantUML: full @startuml...@enduml block. For Mermaid: diagram definition without code fences.

diagram_type.description: Rendering engine. plantuml is preferred for all UML diagram types.

output_format.description: Output image format. SVG is preferred (scalable, smaller, embeds cleanly in DOCX/HTML).

filename.description: Optional output filename stem (no extension). UUID used if omitted.

file_id.description: Filename including extension, as stored in data/documents/.

download_path.description: Relative URL for the download endpoint: /api/v1/documents/{file_id}
